1.content:
## Cert-Manager: Certificate Health
Monitors certificate expiry, renewal timelines, and readiness status for certificates and issuers.

2.title: Days Until Expiry
2.query:
timeseries notAfter = max(certmanager_certificate_not_after_timestamp_seconds), by:{name, exported_namespace}
| fieldsAdd latestVal = arrayLast(notAfter)
| fieldsAdd daysUntilExpiry = (latestVal - toLong(now()) / 1000000000.0) / 86400.0
| fields name, exported_namespace, daysUntilExpiry
| sort daysUntilExpiry asc

3.title: Days Until Renewal
3.query:
timeseries renewal = max(certmanager_certificate_renewal_timestamp_seconds), by:{name, exported_namespace}
| fieldsAdd latestVal = arrayLast(renewal)
| fieldsAdd daysUntilRenewal = (latestVal - toLong(now()) / 1000000000.0) / 86400.0
| fields name, exported_namespace, daysUntilRenewal
| sort daysUntilRenewal asc

4.title: Certificate Ready Status
4.query:
timeseries readyStatus = max(certmanager_certificate_ready_status), by:{name, exported_namespace, condition}
| filter condition == "True"
| fieldsAdd isReady = arrayLast(readyStatus)
| fields name, exported_namespace, isReady
| sort name asc

5.title: ClusterIssuer Ready Status
5.query:
timeseries readyStatus = max(certmanager_clusterissuer_ready_status), by:{name, condition}
| filter condition == "True"
| fieldsAdd isReady = arrayLast(readyStatus)
| fields name, isReady
| sort name asc

6.title: Issuer Ready Status
6.query:
timeseries readyStatus = max(certmanager_issuer_ready_status), by:{name, exported_namespace, condition}
| filter condition == "True"
| fieldsAdd isReady = arrayLast(readyStatus)
| fields name, exported_namespace, isReady
| sort name asc
